parameters.content:
## 📧 PHASE 1: COLLECT
Triggers: Manual (testing) or Email (production)
- Monitors inbox every 20 minutes
- Classifies incoming messages
- Extracts task information
- Requests clarification if needed

## 📧 TRIGGER
Starts the workflow manually for testing.
In production, replace with:
- Email Trigger (IMAP/Gmail)
- Webhook (for form submissions)
- Schedule Trigger (batch processing)

assignments.name: aiPrompt
assignments.value:
Extract feature request details and check if information is complete.

Format:
{
  "complete": true/false,
  "missingInfo": ["list of missing details"],
  "tasks": [{
    "subject": "Short title",
    "description": "WHERE: Page/location\nACTION: Steps\nRESULT: Expected outcome",
    "estimatedHours": null,
    "tags": ["feature", "to-estimate"],
    "attachmentsNeeded": ["mockup", "screenshot"]
  }]
}

IMPORTANT: Respond ONLY with valid JSON.

assignments.name: aiPrompt
assignments.value:
Extract bug details and check completeness.

Format:
{
  "complete": true/false,
  "missingInfo": ["reproduction steps", "expected behavior"],
  "tasks": [{
    "subject": "Bug title",
    "description": "CURRENT STATE: What's broken\nSTEPS TO REPRODUCE:\n1. Step\n2. Step\nEXPECTED: Correct behavior",
    "estimatedHours": null,
    "tags": ["bug", "urgent"],
    "needsManagerApproval": false
  }]
}

IMPORTANT: Respond ONLY with valid JSON.

assignments.name: aiPrompt
aiPrompt
assignments.value:
Extract time estimation from planning poker result.

Format:
{
  "tasks": [{
    "action": "update",
    "taskReference": "Task ID",
    "estimatedHours": <number>,
    "storyPoints": <number>,
    "tags": ["estimated"],
    "removeTag": "to-estimate",
    "moveToColumn": "To Do"
  }]
}

IMPORTANT: Respond ONLY with valid JSON.

assignments.name: aiPrompt

parameters.content:
## ⚠️ CLARIFICATION NEEDED
Task info incomplete.
Draft clarification email for user review.

## 🔀 CLASSIFICATION
Analyzes email content using regex patterns to determine message type:
- Feature Request
- Bug Report
- Approval
- Time Estimation
- Mixed/Other

assignments.name: clarificationDraft
userAlert

parameters.content:
## ✅ PHASE 2: MANAGE/REVIEW
Routes complete tasks based on type:
- Features → Estimation workflow
- Bugs → Priority assessment
- Approvals → Move to To Do
- Estimates → Update & schedule

## 🎯 CONTEXT ENRICHMENT
Adds metadata for each message type:
- Message type identifier
- Priority level
- Default board/column
- Default tags
- AI prompt template

assignments.name: approvalDraft

parameters.content:
## 📦 PHASE 3: DELIVER
Handles task completion:
- Test on staging/dev
- Joint video review
- Calculate client cost
- Notify client

## 🤖 AI PROCESSING
Sends email + context to LLM API (OpenRouter/free model).
Generates structured JSON tasks.

Setup:
1. Get free API key from openrouter.ai
2. Add HTTP Header Auth credential:
   - Name: Authorization
   - Value: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

assignments.name: clientNotificationDraft

parameters.content:
## 🗄️ PHASE 4: STORE/ARCHIVE
End of billing period:
- Check schedule (monthly)
- Compile task list
- Generate report
- Archive completed tasks

## ✅ VALIDATION
Parses AI JSON response.
Validates structure.
Extracts task fields.
Handles errors gracefully.

Outputs:
- subject, description
- board, column, tags
- priority, status
- timestamps
- metadata

assignments.name: reportDraft

parameters.content:
## 🔍 MONITORING & ALERTS
Optional daily checks:
- Unpicked tasks (response time)
- Unfinished tasks (resolution time)
- Send reminders to assignees
- Notify clients if delayed

## 💾 OUTPUT
Success path → Save to database
Error path → Log/notify admin

Replace NoOp nodes with:
- Airtable/NocoDB (create record)
- HTTP Request (webhook)
- Email/Slack (notifications)
- Google Sheets (append row)

assignments.name: reminderDraft
assignments.value:
=Subject: Reminder - Task Awaiting Response

Bonjour,

Tâche: {{ $json.Subject }}
Assigné à: {{ $json.Assignee || 'Non assigné' }}

Cette tâche attend une réponse depuis {{ $json['Expected Response'] }}.

Merci de la traiter rapidement.

Cordialement,
L'équipe

parameters.content:
## 📋 SETUP INSTRUCTIONS

1. API Keys:
   - OpenRouter: openrouter.ai (free)
   - Add as HTTP Header Auth credential

2. Database (choose one):
   - Airtable: airtable.com
   - NocoDB: nocodb.com (self-hosted)

3. Enable Optional Nodes:
   - Email Trigger (IMAP)
   - Schedule Triggers
   - Database Update nodes

4. Configure Alerts:
   - Replace NoOp nodes with Email/Slack
   - Or keep as manual review points

5. Test Flow:
   - Run with test data
   - Check each phase output
   - Verify database updates

## 🔄 OPTIONAL: STATUS MONITORING

Scheduled workflow to check task status:
1. Fetch tasks from database
2. Check expected response/resolution times
3. Send reminders if overdue
4. Update assignees via email/Slack

Similar to reference workflow's daily check feature.
